observed_weaknesses: The sources command ignored unknown extra arguments.
Automation could pass a misspelled sources flag and still see a successful command.

selected_candidate.name: sources extra-arg rejection
selected_candidate.reason: Make sources parsing consistent with other fail-closed CLI commands.
selected_candidate.success_metric: sources --bogus and sources --json --bogus exit non-zero; sources --json still returns 11 roots.

safety_controls: The change is limited to sources command argument validation.
npm run check was rerun after the change.
